commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): hide coplanar edges in HEMesh edge rendering

After split-face extrusion, wall faces share coplanar edges with
adjacent side faces. buildHEEdgeGeometry was rendering ALL topology
edges, including these coplanar ones, creating visible diagonal lines
across stair side faces. Now skips edges where both adjacent faces
have matching normals and lie on the same plane.

Also removes diagnostic logging from applyPushPull (kernel is stable).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: validation seuil 60% + vérif structure HTML

- Seuil abaissé à 60% (Thrive = beaucoup de markup supprimé)
- Ajout vérification wp:paragraph/heading présents
- Store resultHtml pour vérifications structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix AB retry to honor Retry-After header instead of exponential backoff

Exponential backoff (2+4+8+16+32s) exhausted all attempts within the
60s rate limit window, causing every retry to fail. Now waits the exact
duration the API requests plus a 2s buffer before each retry attempt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Auto-calculate iframe height based on code content (#583)

Fix embedded example box heights to show full code by default

The playground iframes used a fixed 400px height with a 55/45 editor/output
split, causing examples to be cut off (e.g. GT's 9-line example only showed
~3 lines). Now the height is auto-calculated from the visible line count
(including scaffold lines), capped at 15 lines, and the CSS split is 70/30
to give the code editor more room.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CEmbccFmziX9fwn8ypUMR8

commit.message:
fix: comments now persist and notify receiver; add interactions to review cards

- Fix backend NPE in FeedInteractionService.toCommentDto — @CreationTimestamp
  is null immediately after save(), fall back to Instant.now() to prevent
  transaction rollback and allow comments + notifications to be saved
- Add 60s polling in NotificationService so receivers see new notifications
  without reloading; polling starts/stops with login state via effect()
- Wire like/comment/share actions to each review card on the trail detail page,
  backed by the same feed_likes/feed_comments tables (ownerUsername:reviewId)

TODO: implement real messaging service (ChatWidgetComponent uses mock data)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(server): Simplify admin API — fix security, dedup, efficiency

Code review findings from simplify pass:

Security:
- Require admin scope for MCP endpoint (was accessible to any token)
- Validate token scopes against whitelist on creation (reject typos)
- Fix SSE filter: use prefix matching so "ci" matches "ci.triggered"

Dedup:
- Consolidate 3 IP extraction implementations into shared extract_ip()
- Replace manual SHA-256 in hash_token with conary_core::hash::sha256

Efficiency:
- Single RwLock acquisition in auth middleware (was 2 separate reads)
- Single-pass scope checking in has_scope (was splitting string twice)
- Extract db_path before handler in audit middleware (was after)

(e.g. "EB Express" in "EB EXPRESS INC"), and first-word match (e.g.

fuzzy match is found.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix tray icon invisible due to near-zero alpha values

cairosvg was producing heavily anti-aliased edges with alpha values of
7-185 instead of 255 on solid pixels. macOS template image rendering
uses alpha for opacity, so near-zero alpha = invisible icon.

Re-rendered SVG at 2x (72×72), thresholded alpha channel (>30→255,
else→0), resized to 36×36, re-encoded as base64 in Swift source.

perf: comprehensive video loading & site-wide polish

Hero video:
- preload="metadata" instead of "auto" (stops eager 80MB download)
- Dual reveal triggers (canplay + playing) with idempotent markVideoReady
- 8s timeout fallback so users never see a black screen
- Animated shimmer placeholder while loading
- Removed broken fallback image, invalid CSS props, console logs

About video:
- Intersection Observer defers download until section is in view
- preload="metadata", skeleton placeholder, smooth opacity reveal
- Compressed video from 16MB to 6.7MB

Navbar:
- Lazy-load BookingModal with React.lazy + Suspense

BusSlideshow:
- Memoized busesWithImages, preload only current + next slide

- Consolidated duplicate stagger classes and media queries (-35% lines)

commit.message:
Adapt parser for AI agent technical discourse

- Add past-tense verb recognition (added, implemented, fixed, etc.)
  for CREATE/MODIFY/OBSERVE acts
- Fix false positive: short patterns (≤3 chars like "no") now require
  word boundary matching to prevent "no" matching inside "now"
- Add technical verb stripping (shows, confirms, completed, etc.)
- Add Pipeline.process_conversation() for multi-turn ingestion
- Export get_format_spec_full from package __init__

Self-test: technical discourse act accuracy improved from 0/11 to 6/11
correct (CREATE 3, OBSERVE 2, MODIFY 1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: 新增疑难问题解答和QMT版本说明文档

- 新增 TROUBLESHOOTING.md：详细的疑难问题解答指南
  - DuckDB数据库找不到问题
  - 数据下载失败、Tushare配置问题
  - xtquant安装、依赖安装问题
  - GUI启动、回测、策略运行问题
  - 性能优化建议

- 新增 QMT_VERSIONS.md：QMT版本说明文档
  - 完整版QMT vs miniQMT对比
  - 环境配置区别说明
  - 明确本项目主要支持miniQMT

- 新增 tools/check_env.py：环境检查工具
  - 一键诊断Python、xtquant、easy_xt等模块
  - 检查DuckDB数据库、Tushare配置
  - 提供快速修复建议

- 更新 README.md：
  - 修复无效的知识星球链接
  - 添加疑难问题解答跳转链接
  - 恢复底部联系方式（公众号、QQ群、知识星球二维码）
  - 更新QMT版本说明链接

- 更新 .gitignore：
  - 添加 tools/check_env.py 例外规则，允许提交

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: add long-running session endurance test (88 turns, 13 compactions)

10-phase stress test: anchor fact planting, context flooding with
large tool outputs, memory retention verification after each compaction,
session restore continuity, compound reasoning, and rapid-fire stress.
Result: 97.9% memory retention across 13 compaction cycles.

commit.message:
Align horizontal divider lines across editor interface (#26)

Adjusts padding and heights to align the three key horizontal separator lines flush: the line above REPOSITORIES in the sidebar, the toolbar bottom border, and the Document Settings panel header line. Changes: logo section from py-4 mb-2 to h-14 flex items-center for consistent header height, title row padding from py-2 to py-[6px] to reduce height, and panel headers from py-2.5 to py-3 to match toolbar height.

Co-authored-by: Adam Reisfield <adamreisfield@Adams-MacBook-Pro-2.local>

Redesign hero collage: scattered asymmetric layout with staggered scroll reveals

Replaces the broken CSS grid collage with individually positioned project images
that fade in with parallax drift as the manifesto text slides apart on scroll.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: full Datadog telemetry — RUM, profiling, log-trace correlation, APM stats

- Add Datadog Browser RUM SDK v6 (session replay, interactions, resources, LCP)
- Add continuous Go profiling via dd-trace-go v1 (CPU/heap/goroutine/mutex)
- Add zerolog traceHook: injects dd.trace_id + dd.span_id for log correlation
- Fix otel-config.yaml: add datadog/connector to compute APM stats (p50–p99,
  error rates, hit rates) — this is what makes distributed tracing detectable
- Fix docker-compose dd-agent: /var/lib/docker/containers volume for log
  collection, DD_SYSTEM_PROBE_ENABLED for USM, DD_NETWORK_PERFORMANCE_MONITORING
- Add DD_PROFILING_ENABLED=true to all three deployment workflows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Pause Feed button and reduce live idle timeout to 15s

Pause Feed button next to LIVE on both home grid and fullscreen views.

auto-stop ffmpeg transcoders. Reduced LIVE_IDLE_TIMEOUT from 30s to 15s.
